query: SELECT id, title, description, destinationCountry, destinationCity, duration, nights, price, heroImage, colorTheme, keyFeatures, sourceUrl FROM tours WHERE id = 1;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4TdGiyGWHynzTjR.2f22c070361b --database D3XjbQ67JpFf2y4FWefWHw --execute SELECT id, title, description, destinationCountry, destinationCity, duration, nights, price, heroImage, colorTheme, keyFeatures, sourceUrl FROM tours WHERE id = 1;
messages: 1	新馬五日：馬六甲老城時光漫步，繁竹谷竹林禪意，水上屋海風輕拂	標題：赤道海風拂面：棕櫚樹下的奢華水屋與古城時光漫步（28字）

描述：清晨，推開水上屋陽台門，海風裹挾著鹹味撲面而來。在黃金棕櫚樹影下，品嚐六格精緻甜點，讓舌尖感受南洋的慵懶。隨後，漫步馬六甲古城，感受紅磚牆訴說的殖民歷史。五日旅程，無購	新加坡	馬來西亞 (新山 馬六甲)	5	4	26999	https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310519663159191204/D3XjbQ67JpFf2y4FWefWHw/tours/hero-1769497153422-fn94f.jpg	{"primary":"#1A1A1A","secondary":"#F5F5F5","accent":"#E63946","text":"#2C3E50","textLight":"#7F8C8D","background":"#F8F9FA","backgroundDark":"#E9ECEF"}	[{"id":1,"image":"","imageAlt":"行程亮點 1","title":"精彩體驗 1","subtitle":"EXPERIENCE","description":"深度體驗當地文化與風情","labelColor":"#F39C12","labelPosition":"bottom-right"},{"id":2,"image":"","imageAlt":"行程亮點 2","title":"安排兩天半在新加坡，輕鬆遊覽各大地標","subtitle":"EXPERIENCE","description":"深度體驗當地文化與風情","labelColor":"#F39C12","labelPosition":"bottom-right"},{"id":3,"image":"","imageAlt":"行程亮點 3","title":"獨家安排入住奢華水上渡假村 (黃金棕櫚渡假村/樓)","subtitle":"EXPERIENCE","description":"深度體驗當地文化與風情","labelColor":"#F39C12","labelPosition":"bottom-right"}]	https://travel.liontravel.com/detail?NormGroupID=ac60c50a-372a-4d7f-a7a4-afd4f93a5b6a&Platform=APP&GroupID=26SS326BRH-T
